checks.action: Run npm run model:movenet:assets:download before provenance review.
checks.detail: Static model asset manifest uses the expected schema.
checks.label: Manifest schema

checks.action: Keep MoveNet source URLs pinned to the official TensorFlow Hub model path.
checks.detail: Manifest source URLs point to the TensorFlow Hub MoveNet SinglePose Lightning model path.
checks.label: Official source URL

checks.action: Keep model asset paths same-origin under /models and aligned with the file inventory.
checks.detail: Manifest lists 3 same-origin model asset file(s).
checks.label: Asset inventory

checks.action: Regenerate public/model-assets.json whenever a model graph or shard changes.
checks.detail: Every model file exists locally and matches its recorded SHA-256 digest.
checks.label: Hash integrity

checks.action: Keep docs/sdlc/model-asset-attribution.md with release evidence and shipped documentation.
checks.detail: Attribution notice names the model, source, manifest, and provenance refresh command.
checks.label: Attribution notice

checks.action: Review upstream model terms from the source catalog before commercial distribution.
checks.detail: The doctor tracks provenance and attribution evidence, but it does not infer final commercial legal clearance from the downloaded files.
checks.label: License review

summary.nextAction: Review upstream model terms before commercial distribution and keep the attribution notice in release evidence.
